meta.description: Oria governed execution rail (dry-run). Verifies x-webhook-secret + HMAC, routes only hermes/task.create, dedups by actionRef, returns standardized JSON. No real side effects. Requires n8n env: ORIA_N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET, ORIA_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET, and NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto.
